items.title: Mansfield's Reed scores fabulous free-kick to upset Burnley
items.summary: Watch Mansfield Town's Louis Reed produce "set-piece sorcery," scoring a sensational free kick to stun Premier League side Burnley and reach the FA Cup fifth round.

items.title: VI Live: NAC verdedigt voorsprong in spannende slotfase in Almelo
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er vier Eredivisie-duels op het programma. Voor Ajax tegen Fortuna Sittard is er een apart liveblog, voor de rest kun je terecht in deze VI Live. En uiteraard ook voor het belangrijkste voetbal in het buitenland.

items.title: Vitesse redt punt na vermakelijke slotfase tegen VVV-Venlo
items.summary: Vitesse en VVV-Venlo hebben zaterdag een punt overgehouden aan hun treffen in de Keuken Kampioen Divisie. Na een vermakelijke slotfase werd de eindstand uiteindelijk 2-2.

items.title: League One Mansfield comeback to stun Burnley
items.summary: League One side Mansfield Town score two unanswered second-half goals to beat Premier League strugglers Burnley 2-1 at Turf Moor in the fourth round of the FA Cup.

items.title: FA Cup-blamage voor Flemming en Hartman tegen League One-club
items.summary: Mansfield Town heeft zaterdagmiddag voor een sensatie gezorgd in het FA Cup-toernooi door Premier League-club Burnley uit te schakelen en gaat zo voor het eerst in meer dan vijftig jaar naar de achtste finale.

items.title: Guehi scores as Man City beat spirited Salford
items.summary: Marc Guehi scores his first goal for Manchester City to seal a 2-0 win for the Premier League side over League Two Salford City in the fourth round of the FA Cup.

items.title: Man City is jaar na achtklapper wel heel zuinig tegen Salford City
items.summary: Manchester City is zaterdagmiddag met de schrik vrijgekomen in de FA Cup-wedstrijd tegen Salford City. De nummer twee van de Premier League zette wel de stap naar de achtste finale van het bekertoernooi.

items.title: Aston Villa v Newcastle: FA Cup fourth round – live
items.summary: Updates from 5.45pm (GMT) game at Villa Park Follow us over on Bluesky | And get in touch: email Barry Those teams: Unai Emery makes seven changes to the team that started against Brighton in midweek. Marco Bizot, Pau Torres, Victor Lindelof, Lucas Digne, Ross Barkley, Leon Bailey and Tammy Abraham all start. Newcastle make six changes to the side that started against Tottenham, as Eddie Howe brings in Aaron Ramsdale, Lewis Hall, Sandro Tonali, Jacob Murphy, Nick Woltemade and William Osula. Continue reading...

items.title: Mansfield stun Burnley, Southampton v Leicester goes to extra time: FA Cup – live
items.summary: Manchester City 2-0 Salford, Norwich 3-1 West Brom Follow us on Bluesky | And get in touch: email Xaymaca Norwich: Grimshaw, Stacey, McConville, Darling, Fisher, Field, Wright, Ahmed, Maghoma, Schwartau, Kvistgaarden Subs: Moulden, Gibbs, Chrisene, Ben Slimane, McLean, Córdoba, Touré, Springett, Mundle-Smith Continue reading...

items.title: Ronaldo returns to Al Nassr lineup as protest ends
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo has returned to Al Nassr's lineup for Saturday's match at Al Fateh after boycotting the club's last two Saudi Pro League matches.

items.title: Man City see off Salford 2-0 in FA Cup 4th round
items.summary: Manchester City reached the fifth round of the FA Cup with a far-from-convincing 2-0 win over League Two side Salford on Saturday.

items.title: Mansfield cause FA Cup upset against Burnley
items.summary: Burnley were on the wrong end of an FA Cup upset as they were beaten 2-1 by Mansfield on Saturday.

items.title: Tottenham appoint Igor Tudor as new head coach
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur have appointed Igor Tudor as their new head coach, the club have confirmed.

items.title: Kane scores 500th goal, Bayern cruise past Bremen
items.summary: Harry Kane scored twice to help Bayern Munich to a 3-0 win against Werder Bremen in the Bundesliga on Saturday.

items.title: Hibs hit back from derby disappointment by easing past St Mirren
items.summary: Owen Elding marked his full Hibernian debut with a goal as David Gray’s side bounced back from their Edinburgh derby disappointment with a comfortable 2-0 victory over St Mirren.

items.title: Guehi's first goal helps Man City to FA Cup win over Salford
items.summary: Manchester City reached the fifth round of the FA Cup with a far-from-convincing 2-0 win over League Two Salford.

items.title: South Africa on brink of Super 8s after easing to victory over New Zealand
items.summary: South Africa are on the brink of the Super 8s at the T20 World after a resounding seven-wicket win over New Zealand in Ahmedabad took them to three victories from three.

items.title: Kane bereikt mijlpaal van 500 goals, Leverkusen dankt Poku tegen St. Pauli
items.summary: Bayern München heeft het gat met Borussia Dortmund weer vergroot tot zes punten. Dat had de club zaterdagmiddag te denken aan Harry Kane, die tegen Werder Bremen zijn 500ste profdoelpunt maakte. Bij Bayer Leverkusen was Ernest Poku belangrijk.

items.title: Saviour Summerville is West Ham's man of the moment
items.summary: Crysencio Summerville is West Ham's saviour again as the Hammers beat Burton to move into the FA Cup fifth round.

items.title: Jonbon digs deep in pulsating Ascot Chase victory
items.summary: Jonbon had to dig as deep as he ever has to see off the gallant Pic d’Orhy in a thrilling renewal of the Betfair Ascot Chase.
